values.content:
You are a support ticket classification assistant. 
Return raw JSON only.

Do not use markdown.
Do not use code fences.
Do not use ```json.
Return only a JSON object.

Classify this support request.

Rules:
If the user cannot access SharePoint, receives Access Denied, lost access, or needs access restored, classify as Access Request.

Categories:
Access Request, Permission Request, Publishing Issue, Training Request, Bug Report, Feature Request, Documentation Request, Other.

Priorities:
Critical, High, Medium, Low.

Return JSON with:
category
priority
product_area
team
confidence
summary

Subject:
{{ $json.email_subject }}

Body:
{{ $json.email_body }}
You are a digital workplace service desk assistant. Return raw JSON only. Do not use markdown. Do not use code fences. Return only a JSON object.

=Create a support engineer resolution plan based on the knowledge article and support request.

Return JSON only.

Requirements:
- recommended_resolution must be an array of numbered troubleshooting or resolution steps.
- Steps must be practical and actionable.
- assignment_group must be a support team name as plain text.
- sla must be a plain text value, never an object.
- next_actions must be an array of concise action items.
- knowledge_article must contain the knowledge article filename.
- Do not return markdown.
- Do not return explanations.
- Do not wrap JSON in code blocks.

Expected JSON structure:
{
  "recommended_resolution": [
    "Step 1",
    "Step 2",
    "Step 3"
  ],
  "knowledge_article": "article-name.md",
  "assignment_group": "Support Team",
  "sla": "Initial Response: 4 Hours, Resolution Target: 1 Business Day",
  "next_actions": [
    "Action 1",
    "Action 2",
    "Action 3"
  ]
}

Classification:
Category: {{$node["Code - Knowledge Base Lookup"].json["category"]}}
Priority: {{$node["Code - Knowledge Base Lookup"].json["priority"]}}
Product Area: {{$node["Code - Knowledge Base Lookup"].json["product_area"]}}
Suggested Team: {{$node["Code - Knowledge Base Lookup"].json["team"]}}

Knowledge Article File:
{{$node["Code - Knowledge Base Lookup"].json["knowledge_article"]}}

Knowledge Article Content:
{{$json.data}}

Original Email:
{{$node["Code - Knowledge Base Lookup"].json["email_body"]}}

parameters.content:
## 🟨 Gmail Trigger - New Support Email


Purpose:
Receives incoming support requests.

Input:
Unread Gmail messages.

Output:
Raw email data.

Required Setup:
• Gmail OAuth connection
• Dedicated support mailbox

Examples:
support@company.com
helpdesk@company.com

## 🟨 Set - Normalize Email Data

Purpose:
Creates a standard email structure.

Extracts:
• Subject
• Sender
• Body
• Message ID
• Timestamp

Output:
Clean support request payload.

Why:
OpenAI and Jira require consistent field names.

## 🟨 OpenAI - Classify Support Request

Purpose:
Analyzes the support request.

Determines:
• Category
• Priority
• Product Area
• Team
• Confidence
• Summary

Example:

Input:
“Cannot access SharePoint”

Output:

Category:
Access Request

Priority:
High

Product Area:
SharePoint

Team:
Access Management

⸻

## 🟨 Code - Knowledge Base Lookup

Purpose:
Maps ticket category to knowledge article.

Examples:

Access Request
→ sharepoint-access.md

Bug Report
→ bug-report.md

Feature Request
→ feature-request.md

Output:
• Knowledge article name
• GitHub article URL

Why:
Selects correct support procedure.

⸻

## 🟨 Code - Parse Classification

Purpose:
Validates OpenAI output.

Tasks:
• Parse JSON
• Handle errors
• Create fallback values
• Merge classification with email data

Output:
Clean classification object.

Why:
Prevents workflow failure.

⸻

## 🟨 HTTP Request - Fetch Knowledge Article

Purpose:
Downloads article from GitHub.

Source:
GitHub Raw URL

Example:

sharepoint-access.md

Output:
Full article content.

Why:
OpenAI needs article text to generate resolution guidance.

⸻

## 🟨 OpenAI - Recommend Resolution

Purpose:
Acts as AI support engineer.

Uses:
• Ticket classification
• Knowledge article
• Original email

Generates:
• Resolution steps
• Assignment group
• SLA
• Next actions

Output:
Structured support recommendation.

⸻

## 🟨 Code - Parse Resolution Recommendation

Purpose:
Formats AI response.

Tasks:
• Parse JSON
• Format resolution steps
• Format next actions
• Convert SLA to text
• Merge all data

Output:
Final support ticket object.

Why:
Jira requires clean text fields.

⸻

## 🟨 Jira - Create Enriched Support Ticket

Purpose:
Creates final support ticket.

Includes:
• AI summary
• Category
• Priority
• Product Area
• Team
• Confidence
• Knowledge article
• Resolution steps
• Next actions
• Original email

Result:
Ready-to-work support ticket.

Business Value:
Support analyst receives a pre-triaged ticket with recommended troubleshooting steps.

## 🟦 Digital Workplace Support Copilot

Goal:
Convert support emails into enriched Jira tickets using AI and a GitHub knowledge base.

Tech Stack:
• Gmail
• n8n
• OpenAI GPT-4o-mini
• GitHub
• Jira

Capabilities:
✓ Email intake
✓ AI classification
✓ Knowledge retrieval
✓ Resolution recommendation
✓ Jira ticket creation

Version:
v3 Knowledge-Assisted Support Copilot

Maturity:
Portfolio Ready / SMB Production Ready
